description_long: This handbag features a structured, trapezoidal silhouette with a wide opening and a slightly rounded base. The exterior is adorned with a bold geometric pattern in black and beige, creating a visually striking contrast. The upper section and handles are made of a solid black material, while the patterned body appears to be woven or textured. Two long, flat shoulder straps are attached symmetrically, allowing for comfortable carrying. The bag is secured with a central flap that fastens with a metallic snap button, adding both function and a subtle decorative touch. The overall design is both practical and stylish, suitable for urban environments.
description: A structured handbag with a black and beige geometric pattern, long black shoulder straps, and a central snap closure flap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric patterned body, black upper section, and two long black shoulder straps with a central snap closure flap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the handbag's narrow profile, teardrop shape, and the continuation of the geometric pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same geometric pattern and black upper section, but without the visible closure flap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and teardrop shape with the patterned body.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, flat shoulder straps, non-adjustable, attached symmetrically to the upper edge.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Central flap with a metallic snap button closure located at the top center of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Geometric pattern in black and beige, featuring circular and diamond motifs.
